sections.paragraph: αἰσχρός, ά, όν [αἶσχος ‘shame, disgrace’; in non-biblical authors freq. in sense of ‘ugly’] ‘of a nature that evokes repugnance’, shameful, low-class, disgraceful 1 Cor 11:6; 14:35; of deeds one would be ashamed even to mention Eph 5:12; with κέρδος = dishonorable money i.e. making money in shameful ways Tit 1:11.
